content:
## Web & AI Solutions Developer @ Antier Solutions Pvt. Ltd. (June 2023 - Present)
- **System Overhaul**: Led corporate-scale redesigns, transforming legacy interfaces into high-conversion, responsive ecosystems.
- **AI-Driven Workflow**: Optimized development cycles by integrating AI R&D Stacks, reducing project completion time while maintaining clean, modular architecture.
- **Brand Integrity**: Maintained 100% brand consistency across multi-platform projects, documenting rigorous design guidelines for cross-functional teams.
- **UX Engineering**: Applied advanced UI/UX principles and conducted user testing to refine interaction strategies, resulting in enhanced user retention.
- **Strategic Collaboration**: Partnered with stakeholders and content architects to align high-level business objectives with technical execution.
